'''dodhamaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:hoaxable|hoaxable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-dh-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hoaxable|hoaxable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dodhamaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dodhamithi|dodhamithi]] || [[word:dodhamiji|dodhamiji]] || [[word:dodhamishi|dodhamishi]] || [[word:dodhamiki|dodhamiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dodhamuthuthu|dodhamuthuthu]] || [[word:dodhamujuju|dodhamujuju]] || [[word:dodhamushushu|dodhamushushu]] || [[word:dodhamukuku|dodhamukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dodhamuthu|dodhamuthu]] || [[word:dodhamuju|dodhamuju]] || [[word:dodhamushu|dodhamushu]] || [[word:dodhamuku|dodhamuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dodhamufthuf|dodhamufthuf]] || [[word:dodhamufjuf|dodhamufjuf]] || [[word:dodhamufshuf|dodhamufshuf]] || [[word:dodhamufkuf|dodhamufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dodhamethe|dodhamethe]] || [[word:dodhameje|dodhameje]] || [[word:dodhameshe|dodhameshe]] || [[word:dodhameke|dodhameke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dodhamothotho|dodhamothotho]] || [[word:dodhamojojo|dodhamojojo]] || [[word:dodhamoshosho|dodhamoshosho]] || [[word:dodhamokoko|dodhamokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dodhamotho|dodhamotho]] || [[word:dodhamojo|dodhamojo]] || [[word:dodhamosho|dodhamosho]] || [[word:dodhamoko|dodhamoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dodhamofthof|dodhamofthof]] || [[word:dodhamofjof|dodhamofjof]] || [[word:dodhamofshof|dodhamofshof]] || [[word:dodhamofkof|dodhamofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dodhamïfthïf|dodhamïfthïf]] || [[word:dodhamïfjïf|dodhamïfjïf]] || [[word:dodhamïfshïf|dodhamïfshïf]] || [[word:dodhamïfkïf|dodhamïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dodhamïfthïfthïf|dodhamïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:dodhamïfjïfjïf|dodhamïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:dodhamïfshïfshïf|dodhamïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:dodhamïfkïfkïf|dodhamïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dodhamïfthïf|dodhamïfthïf]] || [[word:dodhamïfjïf|dodhamïfjïf]] || [[word:dodhamïfshïf|dodhamïfshïf]] || [[word:dodhamïfkïf|dodhamïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dodhamïfthïf|dodhamïfthïf]] || [[word:dodhamïfjïf|dodhamïfjïf]] || [[word:dodhamïfshïf|dodhamïfshïf]] || [[word:dodhamïfkïf|dodhamïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dodhamæthæ|dodhamæthæ]] || [[word:dodhamæjæ|dodhamæjæ]] || [[word:dodhamæshæ|dodhamæshæ]] || [[word:dodhamækæ|dodhamækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dodhamathatha|dodhamathatha]] || [[word:dodhamajaja|dodhamajaja]] || [[word:dodhamashasha|dodhamashasha]] || [[word:dodhamakaka|dodhamakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dodhamatha|dodhamatha]] || [[word:dodhamaja|dodhamaja]] || [[word:dodhamasha|dodhamasha]] || [[word:dodhamaka|dodhamaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dodhamafthaf|dodhamafthaf]] || [[word:dodhamafjaf|dodhamafjaf]] || [[word:dodhamafshaf|dodhamafshaf]] || [[word:dodhamafkaf|dodhamafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dodhamasha|dodhamasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dodhamshësha|dodhamshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dodhamrosha|dodhamrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dodhamusha|dodhamusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dodhamyasha|dodhamyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gododhamnkshësha|gododhamnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gododhamnkrosha|gododhamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gododhamnkmusha|gododhamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gododhamnkyasha|gododhamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dodhadhamasha|dodhadhamasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dodhadhamshësha|dodhadhamshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dodhadhamrosha|dodhadhamrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dodhadhamusha|dodhadhamusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dodhadhamyasha|dodhadhamyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gododhadhamnkshësha|gododhadhamnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gododhadhamnkrosha|gododhadhamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gododhadhamnkmusha|gododhadhamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gododhadhamnkyasha|gododhadhamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dedhæmasha|dedhæmasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dedhæmshësha|dedhæmshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dedhæmrosha|dedhæmrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dedhæmusha|dedhæmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dedhæmyasha|dedhæmyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godedhæmnkshësha|godedhæmnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godedhæmnkrosha|godedhæmnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godedhæmnkmusha|godedhæmnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godedhæmnkyasha|godedhæmnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dodhfamasha|dodhfamasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dodhfamshësha|dodhfamshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dodhfamrosha|dodhfamrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dodhfamusha|dodhfamusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dodhfamyasha|dodhfamyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gododhfamnkshësha|gododhfamnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gododhfamnkrosha|gododhfamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gododhfamnkmusha|gododhfamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gododhfamnkyasha|gododhfamnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
